mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate lower corporate discount rates and borrowing costs, directly increasing the present value of future equity cash flows and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points signals abrupt labor market deterioration and weakening consumer demand, triggering negative equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample accuracy falls below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer spending strength across durable and non-durable sectors, driving positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60d returns, with directional accuracy remaining below 50% over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects improving manufacturing capacity utilization and corporate output growth, generating short-term positive market momentum as earnings expectations adjust upward.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth > 0.5% MoM coincides with negative 5d returns in > 60% of cases during early-cycle phases, invalidating the momentum link.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index levels exceeding 230.0 trigger market expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuation multiples and causing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL > 230.0 yields positive 20d returns in > 55% of observations, or the signal loses predictive power when inflation expectations are anchored.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between declining total nonfarm payrolls and a rising unemployment rate signals structural labor market deterioration and weak hiring, forecasting negative equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: PAYEMS decline combined with UNRATE rise predicts positive 60d returns in > 50% of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth reflects robust economic expansion and corporate earnings growth, generating positive short-term equity momentum as investors price in improved fundamentals.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth > 2% QoQ coincides with negative 5d returns in > 60% of cases, or the correlation coefficient remains below 0.05 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production exceeding 0.3% month-over-month indicates strengthening supply-side capacity and inventory replenishment, supporting positive equity returns as production bottlenecks ease.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration > 0.3% MoM fails to predict positive 20d returns, with directional accuracy dropping below 52% in out-of-sample testing.
